notes: I expected anti-metric pop-spirituality and braced for it. What I got instead: 'this teaching is not anti-metric. It targets the exclusive fixation that treats one bounded number as the entire frame.' That's a real engineering claim. The growth-engineering scenario is recognisable — the team that runs the Mixpanel/Datadog/feature-count standing review while on-call burden quietly doubles is a real thing I have watched happen. The diagnostic 'name three signals it excludes and the implicit there-is-nothing-else clause those exclusions express' is something I can run on my own team's standing review tomorrow. The counter-example correctly carves out the legitimate runway-driven focus case. The verse names a specific organisational pathology, not a generic 'be mindful'. PASS.
